titleStmt.title: SII 40.77: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 77. (A.R. No. B. 55 of 1930.) Takkeḷḷapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Rāmaliṅgasvāmi temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 11[8]1, Siddhārthi, Pushya, śu. 11, Friday, corresponding to 1259 A.D., December 27. However the week day was Saturday.

Records the gift of land for conducting sixteen kinds of homages (Shoḍaśōpachāramulu) to the god Mālinātha at Takkeḷḷapāḍu by Ekarāju, the [Pradhāni] and gajasāhiṇi of the king. Further it records the gift of some land to the god by Ārivēli Malli-Nāyaka for conducting worship, on the occasion of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara kākati gaṇapati
dēva mahārājulu prithivi
rājyaṁ sēyucunuḍḍaṁgānu Ā
rājya prasāda
niyu gajasāhiṇiyunaina E
karāju tamakuṁ buṇyamugānu
śakavatsaramulu 1181 Agu siddhā
¨rtthi saṁvatsara pauṣya śu 11 śukra
vārāna takkeḷlapāṭi mālināthadēva
raku ṣōḍaśōpacārā¨rtthamu
gāṁ beṭṭina vritti kha 1 va Uttarā
yana saṁkrāṁttināṁḍu Ī dēvaraku
Ādyamunaṁgalavritti Ārivēli ma
llināyuni peṭṭinadi kha 1 Ī dē
vara pūjarulu tripura jiya
nu māṁkajēyunu
Digital edition of SII 40.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
